prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial begins on a black screen.

It then cuts to a large blue bottle of **all stainlifter** laundry detergent standing on grass in a baseball stadium. The bottle has a yellow cap and yellow label, with the “all” logo prominently displayed. The stadium field and seating are visible in the background.

A large graphic animation moves across the screen in front of the bottle. Oversized blue-and-white text sweeps in rapidly, partially obscuring the product. The text resolves into a bold promotional message: **“NOW! IN-WASH PRE-TREATERS”**, with “NOW!” in yellow and the other words in white with a blue outline. The detergent bottle remains visible behind the text.

The scene then shifts to a Little League baseball field. A batter in a turquoise uniform stands at home plate, with a catcher and umpire behind him. A pitcher in a yellow uniform is visible in the foreground. Little League Baseball logos appear on the outfield wall.

The next shots show baseball action: a child in a green uniform dives or stretches low across the infield toward a rolling baseball, suggesting a difficult fielding play. Another shot shows players in blue uniforms chasing or fielding a ball across the infield. The camera angle is low and wide, emphasizing the ball and the movement of the players.

A later baseball shot shows two children in turquoise uniforms near the dugout or fence area. One child, wearing a helmet and holding a yellow bat, smiles or reacts excitedly while facing another player whose back is to the camera. Spectators are visible behind a fence.

The commercial then cuts to a bright laundry setting. A pair of hands holds up a white baseball uniform or pants with visible greenish-brown grass/dirt stains on the fabric. A stack of folded clothes is visible in the background.

Next, a clean white background displays the **all stainlifters** logo centered on screen, with the logo in blue and yellow and a small sparkle effect.

The final frame shows a product display in a bright laundry room: the blue **all stainlifter** detergent bottle with yellow cap stands on a clear surface beside folded laundry, a baseball, and a white Little League-related item. Visible text above reads: **“give us your worst, we’ll give it our all”** with the “all” logo at the end. A Little League Baseball logo is also visible near the lower left.
